HEY THERE, This is |

About ME.

Hey, I'm Abdul Basit Shahid a Software Engineering student at COMSATS Lahore Campus (Spring 2025 batch). I'm based in Lahore, Pakistan, and I spend most of my time geeking out over Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Design, and building things end-to-end with Full-Stack Web Development and Backend Engineering. I like turning ideas into working code and figuring out how systems tick under the hood.

Hey, I'm Abdul Basit Shahid a Software Engineering student at COMSATS Lahore Campus (Spring 2025 batch). I'm based in Lahore, Pakistan, and I spend most of my time geeking out over Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Design, and building things end-to-end with Full-Stack Web Development and Backend Engineering. I like turning ideas into working code and figuring out how systems tick under the hood.|

Tech Stack.

Laravel

Core Engine

My core architecture suite. Used to build secure, robust APIs and service layers, focusing heavily on optimized database design, custom caching strategies, and reliable background job queues.

GitHub

Core Engine

Crucial for workflow automation and source integrity. Beyond basic hosting, I emphasize semantic version control and continuous integration paths to streamline development pipeline speed.

WordPress

Core Engine

Leveraged for rapid deployment of heavy content structures. I bypass template assumptions to write optimized queries, clean headless integration layers, and performant local setups.

HTML & CSS

Core Engine

The core canvas of the web interface layer. I prioritize structural, semantic markup and fast utility styling via Tailwind CSS to build layouts that render instantly under any regional connection constraint.

Open Source

My Projects.

Full Stack
Desktop App
Downloading

FastFood Invoice System

PHP / Laravel

A full-stack Laravel-based invoice management system for fast-food restaurants. Features role-based access control, guest profiles, OTP-less login, Docker deployment, and a complete order billing workflow.

View on GitHub

Drop

Electron / JS

A minimal, blazing-fast drag-and-drop file utility built for developers. Features instant file transfers, glowing drop zones, multi-format support, and a clean dark UI designed for productive workflows.

View on GitHub

TurboDM

Electron / Node

TurboDM is a high-performance, professional-grade Download Manager built for Windows. It features a sleek, neon-inspired UI and a powerful multi-threaded core capable of accelerating downloads with up to 32 parallel connections.

View on GitHub

FUTURE GOALS.

Strengthening the Foundation

Deepening my grasp of core computer science — currently pushing further into Trees, Graphs, and Dynamic Programming while leveling up my Node.js skills to complement the Laravel based backend work I already do.

Building Real, Complete Projects

I’m moving beyond small scripts to build complete, end-to-end applications. My focus is on creating polished, functional systems that solve real problems — with clean code, solid architecture, and attention to detail.

Exploring Tooling & Systems

I’m diving into developer tools, CLIs, and systems-level utilities. The goal is to build software that improves workflows, automates repetitive tasks, and operates with speed and precision at a lower level.

Backend & API Architecture

I’m focusing on building fast, scalable, and maintainable backend systems. My goal is to design clean APIs, optimize database performance, and implement robust server-side logic that can support complex applications and high-traffic demands.
